title: OUTPATIENT MENTAL HEALTH CARE - 211info
text: KINSHIP HOUSE OUTPATIENT MENTAL HEALTH CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides outpatient mental health therapy and advocacy to children and their foster or adoptive families. Specialized child welfare assessments for parent-child interaction, siblings, and individual needs provided statewide. Offers professional training and community education, including workshops, support groups, and appropriate medical referrals. 1823 NE 8th Avenue Portland, OR 97212 Eligibility: Age 18 and younger who are in the foster care system or involved in the adoption process Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 460-2796 106 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 460-2796 Main phone (503) 460-3750 FAX Intake Main phone (503) 460-2796 ext 106 Intake Coordinator Cell (503) 724-1086 Intake FAX (503) 460-3750 Intake Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for intake forms or call for information FEES: Varies by service. Sliding scale, OHP, self-pay, and private insurance. Child Welfare Assessments normally funded through the Oregon Department of Human Services. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees. AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Assessments and treatment planning: State of Oregon Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling * Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues Child Guidance * Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues Early Intervention for Mental Illness * Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues Family Counseling * Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues Mental Health Evaluation * Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues Mental Health Related Support Groups * Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues Physician Referrals * Foster Children If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. KINSHIP HOUSE
